arts.ttl: Man United unhappy with Erik ten Hag’s handling of two players as Thomas Tuchel waits in the wings
arts.sum: Manchester United are set to evaluate the possibility of changing manager during the international break if Erik ten Hag suffers another poor result and performance in today’s Premier League clash with Aston Villa. arts.ttl: When is Aston Villa - Manchester United? Times, how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: In their most recent Premier League game, fifth-placed Villa tied 2-2 against Ipswich Town; that’s the the only time they have failed to win in their last seven outings in all competitions. The Premier League matchday-seven game between Aston Villa and Manchester United will be played at Villa Park in Birmingham, UK, on Sunday October 6, 2024.
